title: sidastuff Resource Pack
description: My official texture pack! Optimized for Crystal PvP, with short swords, less particles, small totem pop etc.
body: I create and maintain an official Minecraft texture pack optimized for Crystal PvP—built for clarity, speed, and competitive performance. It features short swords, reduced particles, and a small totem pop design to keep your screen clean and your reactions sharp.<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/O6lOVvGbVT8" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
